_comment: Example values for adding agentctx as a Claude.ai custom connector (Settings -> Connectors -> Add custom connector). PLACEHOLDERS ONLY - replace url with your self-hosted endpoint. No credential is included; if your endpoint requires auth, supply it in the Claude.ai connector UI, not here.
name: agentctx

auth._note: Set to operator bearer/OAuth in the Claude.ai UI if the endpoint is private. Never commit the value.
